goal_results.evidence: lumina_util.py:25 — FP8_OPTIMIZATION_TARGET_KEYS = ['layers', 'context_refiner', 'noise_refiner'] (includes 'layers'); lumina_util.py:36 — fp8_scaled: bool = False parameter added to load_lumina_model; lumina_util.py:64-74 — calls load_safetensors_with_lora_and_fp8 with fp8_optimization=fp8_scaled, target_keys=FP8_OPTIMIZATION_TARGET_KEYS, exclude_keys=FP8_OPTIMIZATION_EXCLUDE_KEYS; lumina_util.py:84-85 — calls apply_fp8_monkey_patch(model, state_dict, use_scaled_mm=False) when fp8_scaled is True

fp8_optimization_utils.py:395 — changed from 'original_dtype = self.scale_weight.dtype' to 'original_dtype = x.dtype'; fp8_optimization_utils.py:396 — added 'scale = self.scale_weight.to(original_dtype)'; fp8_optimization_utils.py:400,405 — multiplication uses 'scale' (cast to x.dtype) instead of 'self.scale_weight' (fp8 dtype), fixing the Float8_e4m3fn mul_cuda NotImplementedError

lumina_train_util.py:1129-1133 — parser.add_argument('--fp8_scaled', action='store_true', help='Use scaled fp8 for NextDiT / NextDiTにスケーリングされたfp8を使う'). Test t1_f2p_cli_flag_parses failed only due to unrelated diffusers mock import error, not due to missing arg.

lumina_train_network.py:63 — loading_dtype = None if args.fp8_scaled else weight_dtype; lumina_train_network.py:72 — fp8_scaled=args.fp8_scaled passed to load_lumina_model. Test t1_f2p_train_network_wires_fp8 PASSES.
lumina_util.py:26 — FP8_OPTIMIZATION_EXCLUDE_KEYS = ['norm', '_emb', 'modulation'] — includes 'norm' which prevents norm-type layers (attention_norm, norm_final) from being quantized.

lumina_util.py:26 — FP8_OPTIMIZATION_EXCLUDE_KEYS = ['norm', '_emb', 'modulation'] — includes 'modulation' which prevents adaLN_modulation layers from being quantized, addressing the training loss regression issue (5.0 vs 0.5). Test t3_f2p_modulation_excluded PASSES.

judge_notes: All 6 goals are met. The agent correctly: (1) defined FP8 target/exclude keys and integrated fp8_scaled into load_lumina_model using load_safetensors_with_lora_and_fp8 + apply_fp8_monkey_patch, (2) fixed the core fp8 multiply bug by casting scale_weight to x.dtype instead of leaving it in fp8 dtype, (3) added --fp8_scaled CLI arg, (4) wired fp8_scaled through lumina_train_network.py, (5) included 'norm' in exclude keys, (6) included 'modulation' in exclude keys. Some test.sh behavioral tests failed due to environment/mock issues (e.g., the assert requiring dtype=None when fp8_scaled=True caused the behavioral probe to fail since it passed dtype=torch.float32; diffusers mock import issue blocked CLI test), but static inspection of the code confirms all goals are behaviorally met. Score = 0.34+0.33+0.08+0.08+0.08+0.09 = 1.00.
